entities.name: INDIAN PEANUT CLUMP VIRUS
entities.description: A plant virus that causes clump disease in peanuts.

entities.name: RNA
entities.description: The ribonucleic acid genetic material extracted from Indian peanut clump virus particles.

entities.name: MESSENGER-DEPENDENT RETICULOCYTE LYSATE
entities.description: A cell-free translation system used to synthesize proteins from messenger RNA.

entities.name: 195000 MOL WT PRODUCT
entities.description: A large polypeptide product with a molecular weight of approximately 195,000, translated from RNA-1.

entities.name: 143000 MOL WT PRODUCT
entities.description: A polypeptide product with a molecular weight of approximately 143,000, translated from RNA-1.

entities.name: 24500 MOL WT PRODUCT
entities.description: A polypeptide product with a molecular weight of approximately 24,500, translated from RNA-2 and identified as the coat protein.

entities.name: IPCV COAT PROTEIN
entities.description: The structural protein of the Indian peanut clump virus.

entities.name: ANTISERUM
entities.description: An antibody-containing serum used to identify the 24,500 mol. wt. polypeptide.

entities.name: RNA-1
entities.description: The larger RNA species of the IPCV genome with a molecular weight of 1.9 x 10^6.

entities.name: RNA-2
entities.description: The smaller RNA species of the IPCV genome with a molecular weight of 1.6 x 10^6.

entities.name: 50000 MOL WT PRODUCT
entities.description: A polypeptide product with a molecular weight of 50,000, translated from RNA of 0.5 x 10^6 to 0.9 x 10^6 mol. wt.

entities.name: 20000 MOL WT PRODUCT
entities.description: A polypeptide product with a molecular weight of 20,000, translated from RNA of about 0.2 x 10^6 mol. wt.

entities.name: BIPARTITE GENOMES
entities.description: A genome structure consisting of two separate RNA molecules.

entities.name: SUBGENOMIC MESSENGER
entities.description: A type of RNA that may be the source of certain translation products.

entities.name: SATELLITE RNA
entities.description: A type of RNA that may be the source of certain translation products.
